testcase.name: test_suggest_is_sorted_and_unique

failure.message: TypeError: unhashable type: 'SuggestionItem'

testcase.failure: tests\suggestion\test_c.py:30: in test_suggest_is_sorted_and_unique assert result == sorted(set(result)) ^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: unhashable type: 'SuggestionItem'

testcase.name: test_includes_c_keywords

failure.message: AssertionError: missing keyword: int assert 'int' in [SuggestionItem(label='#define', priority=15, kind='preprocessor'), SuggestionItem(label='#elif', priority=15, kind='preprocessor'), SuggestionItem(label='#else', priority=15, kind='preprocessor'), SuggestionItem(label='#endif', priority=15, kind='preprocessor'), SuggestionItem(label='#error', priority=15, kind='preprocessor'), SuggestionItem(label='#if', priority=15, kind='preprocessor'), ...]

failure.message: AttributeError: 'SuggestionItem' object has no attribute 'startswith'

testcase.name: test_root_functions_visible_in_nested_scope

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'helper' in [SuggestionItem(label='helper', priority=5, kind='function'), SuggestionItem(label='runner', priority=5, kind='function'), SuggestionItem(label='and', priority=15, kind='keyword'), SuggestionItem(label='as', priority=15, kind='keyword'), SuggestionItem(label='assert', priority=15, kind='keyword'), SuggestionItem(label='async', priority=15, kind='keyword'), ...]

testcase.failure: tests\suggestion\test_python.py:209: in test_root_functions_visible_in_nested_scope assert "helper" in result E AssertionError: assert 'helper' in [SuggestionItem(label='helper', priority=5, kind='function'), SuggestionItem(label='runner', priority=5, kind='function'), SuggestionItem(label='and', priority=15, kind='keyword'), SuggestionItem(label='as', priority=15, kind='keyword'), SuggestionItem(label='assert', priority=15, kind='keyword'), SuggestionItem(label='async', priority=15, kind='keyword'), ...]

testcase.name: test_self_dot_suggests_class_methods

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'greet' in [SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__eq__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__format__', priority=5, kind='method'), ...]

testcase.failure: tests\suggestion\test_python.py:229: in test_self_dot_suggests_class_methods assert "greet" in result E AssertionError: assert 'greet' in [SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__eq__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__format__', priority=5, kind='method'), ...]

testcase.name: test_self_dot_outside_class_returns_generic_dunders

failure.message: AssertionError: assert '__init__' in [SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__eq__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__format__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), ...]

testcase.failure: tests\suggestion\test_python.py:239: in test_self_dot_outside_class_returns_generic_dunders assert "__init__" in result E AssertionError: assert '__init__' in [SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__eq__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__format__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), ...]

testcase.name: test_str_dot_returns_str_attributes

failure.message: AssertionError: missing attribute: upper assert 'upper' in [SuggestionItem(label='__add__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__contains__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), ...]

testcase.failure: tests\suggestion\test_python.py:251: in test_str_dot_returns_str_attributes assert attr in result, f"missing attribute: {attr}" E AssertionError: missing attribute: upper E assert 'upper' in [SuggestionItem(label='__add__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__contains__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), ...]

testcase.name: test_int_dot_with_b_prefix

failure.message: AttributeError: 'SuggestionItem' object has no attribute 'startswith'

testcase.failure: tests\suggestion\test_python.py:270: in test_int_dot_with_b_prefix assert s.startswith("b"), f"unexpected suggestion: {s!r}" ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'SuggestionItem' object has no attribute 'startswith'

testcase.name: test_unknown_object_returns_generic_dunders

failure.message: AssertionError: assert '__init__' in [SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__eq__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), SuggestionItem(label='__format__', priority=30, kind='attribute'), ...]

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [SuggestionIt...='attribute')] == ['upper']
At index 0 diff: SuggestionItem(label='upper', priority=30, kind='attribute') != 'upper'
Full diff: [ - 'upper', + SuggestionItem(...
...Full output truncated (5 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

E E ...Full output truncated (5 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'greet' in [SuggestionItem(label='__class__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__delattr__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__dir__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__doc__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__eq__', priority=5, kind='method'), SuggestionItem(label='__format__', priority=5, kind='method'), ...]
